name: Coit Tower
summary_en: The Coit Tower record is built around its art and preservation history: a 1989 Historic Structure Report by the Arts Commission, city art-collection surveys from 1953 and 1975, and Art Commission minutes going back to 1934 documenting the tower's murals, plus a 1983 Board of Supervisors landmark ordinance for the Lillie Hitchcock Coit Tower. Later items track mural restoration and site management, including a Board resolution recording a $662,400 agreement with Coit Tower, LLC to operate and manage the site. Coit Tower is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line totals about $250M.
